title: Per-Foot Contracts
description: Some contracts pay per foot of road built, incentivizing winding routes that maximize length. This creates a short-term vs long-term tension: winding routes earn more now but are less efficient later. Good for driving out competitors on specific roads.
definition-of-done: Per-foot payment contracts available. Payment calculated by road length. Winding routes produce more payment. UI shows length vs efficiency tradeoff.
testing-plan: Verify per-foot payment calculation. Test that winding routes earn more. Verify tradeoff visibility in contract UI.
todos: Design contract types with different incentives
Build tradeoff visualization in contract UI
